html:
Exclusive to:

The Loot Stash is a naturally-spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It can usually be found in the Deciduous Forest or in the Mosaic Biome. A Loot Stash will spawn 1-3 days after the beginning of every Winter or spawn on day 1 during the Winter's Feast event. The spawn location of the Loot Stash changes with each passing Winter, it will despawn 1-3 days after the beginning of Spring and will respawn at the start of the next winter. (or after 20 days have passed during the Winter’s Feast event.) Attempting to open the Loot Stash with a Deer Antler will drop Bone Shards and summon Klaus. Using the Stag Antler on the Loot Stash will properly unlock it, causing it to drop 4 Bundled Supplies.

Contents

  • 1 Content
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Bugs
  • 5 Gallery

Content

Below is a table of the possible loot contained in the Bundled Supplies. During the Winter's Feast event, players receive 6 gifts instead when the Loot Stash is unlocked.

Bundle 1 ×1 ×1 ×1-2
Bundle 2 50% ×1 ×1-3
Bundle 3 10% ×1 ×1-3
Bundle 4 1 of (, , , , )

2 different items of (, , , , , , , ,)
50% for (, , , , , , , , ).

Bundle 5
(Winter's Feast only) 		×2
4x or 4x
Bundle 6
(Winter's Feast only) 		1 of (, , , )

1 Fancy Festive Bauble
1 Festive Light
1 Basic Festive Bauble or 1 Fancy Festive Bauble or 1 Festive Light

Tips

  • The loot content is decided upon creation of the Loot Stash, therefore if the player didn't find the items it wanted to find in the Bundled Supplies, the server would have to be rolled back to before the Loot Stash is spawned and Klaus must be defeated to try again.
  • If the Stag Antler exists in a world, Klaus can not be spawned by using another Deer Antler on a Loot Stash. Attempting to do so will still consume the Deer Antler, and still drop a Bone Shard.

Trivia

  • The Loot Stash was introduced in the Winter's Feast update, alongside the event of the same name.
  • The Loot Stash's chains are golden during the Winter's Feast event.
  • The following Bosses have exclusive drops unobtainable through the Loot Stash: Misery Toadstool (rare Blueprint for the Napsack), Ancient Guardian (Guardian's Horn), Ancient Fuelweaver (Shadow Thurible, Bone Helm, & Bone Armor), and the Celestial Champion (Enlightened Crown).

Bugs

  • The Loot Stash will despawn after the end of the Winter's Feast event.
    • If it despawns in the beginning of winter (day 21), it will not spawn again until the next winter.

Gallery

  • Loot Stash found in Mosaic Biome.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

–Winona

–Wortox
“Open it! Open it!”
–Wurt
“Hey, he brought presents!”
–Walter
“At least he left some goodies!”
–Wanda
The Loot Stash is a naturally-spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It can usually be found in the Deciduous Forest or in the Mosaic Biome. A Loot Stash will spawn 1-3 days after the beginning of every Winter or spawn on day 1 during the Winter's Feast event. The spawn location of the Loot Stash changes with each passing Winter, it will despawn 1-3 days after the beginning of Spring and will respawn at the start of the next winter. (or after 20 days have passed during the Winter’s Feast event.) Attempting to open the Loot Stash with a Deer Antler will drop Bone Shards and summon Klaus. Using the Stag Antler on the Loot Stash will properly unlock it, causing it to drop 4 Bundled Supplies.

The loot content is decided upon creation of the Loot Stash, therefore if the player didn't find the items it wanted to find in the Bundled Supplies, the server would have to be rolled back to before the Loot Stash is spawned and Klaus must be defeated to try again.
If the Stag Antler exists in a world, Klaus can not be spawned by using another Deer Antler on a Loot Stash. Attempting to do so will still consume the Deer Antler, and still drop a Bone Shard.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Loot Stash was introduced in the Winter's Feast update, alongside the event of the same name.
The Loot Stash's chains are golden during the Winter's Feast event.
The following Bosses have exclusive drops unobtainable through the Loot Stash: Misery Toadstool (rare Blueprint for the Napsack), Ancient Guardian (Guardian's Horn), Ancient Fuelweaver (Shadow Thurible, Bone Helm, & Bone Armor), and the Celestial Champion (Enlightened Crown).

If it despawns in the beginning of winter (day 21), it will not spawn again until the next winter.
